content.content:
I found your dental appointment: "Dentist Appointment" (event id 5)
- When: 2024-05-18, 09:00–10:00
- Where: Downtown Dental Clinic
- Status: confirmed
- Duration: 1 hour

Do you want me to reschedule that event (id 5)? If so, tell me one of the following:
- A specific new date and time (e.g., "May 22 at 11:00"), or
- A date range and preferred time of day (e.g., "sometime next week, mornings only"), or
- "Earliest available" and I’ll search your calendar and propose the next free slots.

Also tell me whether I should:
- Notify the clinic or any other participant (if yes, provide the clinic contact email or let me send only the calendar update), and
- Keep the same duration (1 hour) or change it.

Which option do you want?
